commands.description: List projects in the current Prototype Design workspace.

limit.description: Maximum number of projects to return.

commands.description: Open the Prototype Design dashboard or an existing project.

project-id.description: Project id. Omit to open the dashboard.

commands.description: Create a new project from a prompt and initialize its default conversation. Returns the project and the created conversationId. When invoking as an agent, summarize the prompt into a concise project title within 20 characters and pass it as title.

prompt.description: Design prompt describing the prototype to build.

title.description: Optional project title summarized from the prompt, within 20 characters. If omitted, the server derives a short title from the prompt.

design-system-id.description: Optional design system id to apply.

commands.summary: Send a message and run the agent
commands.description: Send a prompt into a project conversation and run the agent to completion, then return the full agent conversation messages. When conversation-id is omitted, a conversation is created automatically before sending. This call is synchronous: it waits for the run to finish. Provider fallback: the default provider is Codex; if Codex is unavailable or breaks mid-run (e.g. a 401/auth error), the command automatically falls back to Claude Code and reports it in the result's `agentFallback` field (the fallback runs in a new conversation, so the returned conversationId may differ). If you already know Codex is down you can force Claude Code directly with --agent-id claude. Provider-locked conversations: a conversation is pinned to its first provider, so requesting a different provider for it starts a fresh conversation automatically (reported via `agentFallback` with stage `conversation-locked`) instead of failing.

prompt.description: Message to send to the agent (alias: message).

conversation-id.description: Optional conversation id. When omitted, a conversation is created and the message is sent to it.

agent-id.description: Optional agent/provider id (codex | claude). Defaults to Codex, which auto-falls back to Claude Code when broken. Pass claude to skip Codex entirely if you know it is down.

commands.description: Return all messages in a project conversation.
List file resources for one project, including each resource's static HTTP URL.
Return a file resource. Text files use utf8; binary files use base64.
List comments for a project conversation.
